creator: kraileth@elderlinux.org
text:
(In reply to Jessica Clarke from comment #2)

Good point! No, I haven't. I cloned the source and checked out the various commits manually. I admit not having used release.sh in a while - since before the git transition. Will do some reading and then try again if I can get an ISO built that mostly matches the official -BETA1 image that I have. Thanks!
